title: BuildVideo
subtitle: AI Film & TV Studio
heroDescription: The most powerful open-source AI video production pipeline. Paste your story, get a complete animated video — characters, storyboards, voiceover, and final cut, all generated by AI agents.

features.title: End-to-End AI Production Pipeline
features.subtitle: 6 specialized AI agents work in parallel to turn your text into broadcast-ready video content

script.title: AI Script Analysis Engine
script.description: Powered by Claude, GPT-4, Gemini and more via OpenRouter. Automatically parses novels into structured screenplays — extracting characters, locations, emotions, camera directions and dialogue in seconds.

character.title: Consistent Character Generation
character.description: Generate anime characters via 7+ image providers (Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, Seedream, Flux, etc.). AI maintains strict visual identity across hundreds of shots.

storyboard.title: 4-Phase Smart Storyboard
storyboard.description: Planning → Cinematography → Acting Direction → Supplementary Details. Each shot gets AI-generated composition, camera angle, lighting and character placement.

world.title: World & Scene Building
world.description: Generate consistent environments from text descriptions. AI builds location libraries that stay coherent across your entire production.

voice.title: Multi-Character AI Voice
voice.description: Natural voiceover with emotion control. Supports voice design, cloning, and multi-character dialogue. Integrated lip-sync for character animation.

video.title: One-Click Video Assembly
video.description: 6+ video generation providers (Kling, Runway, Seedance, Luma, Pika, etc.). Auto-compose with transitions, subtitles, BGM and export in any format.

power.title: Built for Serious Production
power.subtitle: Not a toy demo — a production-grade pipeline

agents.label: Task Handlers
agents.desc: Specialized AI workers for every step

queues.label: Parallel Queues
queues.desc: Image, video, voice & text run concurrently

providers.title: Integrates With The Best AI Models
providers.subtitle: Use your own API keys — no vendor lock-in
providers.image: Image: Midjourney, DALL-E 3, Stable Diffusion, Seedream, Flux, FAL, Google Imagen
providers.video: Video: Kling, Runway, Seedance, Luma Dream Machine, Pika, Vidu
providers.voice: Voice: Custom TTS, Voice Design & Cloning
providers.llm: LLM: Claude, GPT-4, Gemini, DeepSeek, Qwen via OpenRouter

workflow.title: From Story to Screen in 4 Steps
workflow.subtitle: Multi-agent pipeline handles the entire production automatically

step1.title: Import Your Story
step1.description: Paste a novel chapter, screenplay, or any creative text. Supports Chinese & English.

step2.title: AI Agents Analyze
step2.description: Screenwriter agent extracts characters, locations, and scenes. Director agent plans every shot.

step3.title: Parallel Generation
step3.description: Artist, voice, and subtitle agents work in parallel — generating images, voiceover, and text simultaneously.

step4.title: Auto-Compose & Export
step4.description: Editor agent assembles everything into a final video with transitions, music, and subtitles.

selfhost.title: Self-Hosted. Your Data. Your Keys.
selfhost.subtitle: Deploy with Docker in 2 minutes. All AI API calls go directly from your server to providers. No middleman, no data collection, no usage limits.

cta.title: Start Producing AI Videos Today
cta.subtitle: Self-host for free, or try it live. No credit card. No vendor lock-in. Full control.
